_meta.purpose: island car-driver mobilisation level + common-mode prior width

ni_source.modes: Car Driver + Motorcycle + Other private (van/lorry) + Taxi (TSNI Table_3_2, 2023)

_meta.vintage_note: NI TSNI 2023, RoI CSO 2019 — deliberate best-available-per-jurisdiction
_meta.sigma_mob_recipe: hypot(between_region_cv, within_region_ownership_cv); within uses car-ownership CV as a proxy for use-dispersion (RoI household-weighted, NI person-weighted — approximate)
